# Baltimore Wedding Planner — AI Crawler Access File
# baltimoreweddingplanner.com
# Updated: 2026-06-04

## About This Site
Baltimore Wedding Planner is a professional wedding planning service based in Baltimore, Maryland.
John provides budget-friendly wedding planning for couples with budgets under $20,000 across Maryland.

## Services
- Full-Service Wedding Planning: /services/full-service-wedding-planning
- Day-of Wedding Coordination: /services/day-of-wedding-coordinator
- Partial Wedding Planning: /services/partial-wedding-planning
- Elopement Planning: /services/elopement-planner-maryland
- All Packages & Pricing: /wedding-planning-packages
